name: Mt Malcolm Mines NL
description: Mt Malcolm Mines NL (M2M) is a gold-focused exploration company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange. Based in Western Australia, the company has assembled a comprehensive and prospective tenement package covering approximately 274 square kilometers surrounding the historic Malcolm Mining Centre in the Central Eastern Goldfields. Since its listing in September 2021, the company has been actively advancing its diversified portfolio of gold prospects, with a primary focus on its flagship Golden Crown project, located in a well-endowed tier-one mineral province near Leonora.
